title: Vehicle, method of control of power reception of vehicle, and nontransitory computer recording medium
abstract: A vehicle enabling confirmation of an end of power transfer from a ground power supplying apparatus at the vehicle side, that is, a vehicle receiving power from a ground power supplying apparatus by noncontact, provided with a power reception apparatus for receiving power from the ground power supplying apparatus and a control device configured to judge an end of power transfer from the ground power supplying apparatus based on a change along with time of received power received by the power reception apparatus.
claims: 1. A vehicle configured to receive power from a ground power supplying apparatus by noncontact, the vehicle comprising: a power reception apparatus configured to receive power from the ground power supplying apparatus; a narrow range communication device utilizing narrow range wireless communication to directly communicate with the ground power supplying apparatus; a control device configured to: judge an end of power transfer from the ground power supplying apparatus based on a change along with time of received power received by the power reception apparatus, after transmitting vehicle identification information to the ground power supplying apparatus through the narrow range communication device; and upon judging the end of power transfer, causes the ground power supplying apparatus to perform power transmission end processing which includes stopping supply of current to a power transmission side resonance circuit; and a communication device for directly or indirectly communicating with the ground power supplying apparatus, wherein the control device is further configured to judge whether the ground power supplying apparatus has ended power transfer in accordance with a power transmission stop request based on the change along with time of received power after transmitting the power transmission stop request when transmitting the power transmission stop request to the ground power supplying apparatus through the communication device.
